summary: Fire-and-forget migration on startup may race with first query
details: The applyMigrations(db) call in db.ts Client init is fire-and-forget. If the first application query arrives before migrations complete, the table structure may be incomplete. In practice PGlite migrations complete in <100ms locally, but in edge cases (e.g., slow filesystem, locked DB) this could cause transient errors. A production-grade fix would add a Deferred migrationComplete latch and await it in the query path. This is deferred as low-impact since the existing migration test confirms all migrations apply within test timeouts.
